input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 14 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "general", "count": 4, "message": "4 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 3, "message": "3 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 3, "message": "3 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 394, "current_utilization": 23, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: []. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Charge Nurse, anticipate 14 incoming patients. Please activate the crisis team for the 3 incoming mental health patients and initiate infection control protocols for the 3 GI patients. Current capacity is stable for the next two hours, with no diversions recommended.
